framework.name: IETF Agent Operation Authorization (draft-liu-agent-operation-authorization-00)
framework.description: Alibaba-authored IETF draft (Nov 2025, Standards Track, OAuth WG) defining a two-phase JWT-based framework for delegating human authorization to AI agents. Phase 1: agent constructs a structured operation proposal from natural language, wraps the user prompt in a W3C Verifiable Credential (JWT-VC), and submits via OAuth 2.0 PAR (RFC 9126). Phase 2: after user consent, the AS issues an Agent Operation Authorization Token (JWT access token) with fine-grained operations, constraints, CEL-based conditions, and a semantic audit trail.
framework.raw_quote: This document specifies the Agent Operation Authorization framework — a structured mechanism that enables verifiable delegation of actions from human principals to autonomous AI agents with fine-grained agent operation authorization.
